🎵 VOZZ RICH - ELECTRONIC PRESS KIT 2025 🎵

🎨 ARTIST PROFILE
• Genre: Electronic/House/Dance
• Based: United States
• Signature Sound: Fusion of Detroit house, underground rave, salsa, techno, and big room elements

📈 STREAMING & SOCIAL METRICS
• Spotify Monthly Listeners: 24,778
• Spotify Followers: 4,109
• Instagram Followers: 4,875
• Total Track Catalog: 47 releases

🎧 NOTABLE RELEASES (2024-2025)
• "House Ablaze" (December 2024)
• "She's Burning High - Vozz Edit" w/ Leigh Macneil
• "Mi Corazon Batalla" - Original & Extended Mix
• "Breathless" collaboration w/ L25

🤝 RECENT COLLABORATIONS
• Kicevski - "Safe and Sound"
• PAUL PARKER - "Sofi Disco" (Vozz Rich Remix)
• Artsychoke - "Butterflies" (Vozz Rich Remix)
• Jaytor - "Dance All Night" (Vozz Rich Remix)

• Consistent release schedule with 47+ tracks in catalog
• Strong cross-genre appeal combining Latin and electronic elements
• Growing international streaming presence
• Regular remix work for established artists

• Steady increase in Last.fm listeners (608 → 729 in past 90 days)
• Consistent Spotify monthly listener base of 20-25k
• Active release schedule with multiple formats (Radio Edits, Extended Mixes)
